basics.name: Junteng Liu
basics.summary: First-year PhD candidate at HKUST NLP Group, researching natural language processing and machine learning. Focus on LLM Reasoning, Reinforcement Learning, Hallucination in Vision-Language Models, and LLM Truthfulness and Interpretability.

work.summary: Research internship focusing on natural language processing and machine learning research.
highlights: Conducting research on large language models and AI systems

work.summary: Research internship under the supervision of Zifei Shan, focusing on AI and machine learning research.
highlights: Conducted research on vision-language models and chart understanding
Published work on perception bottlenecks in VLMs

work.summary: Research internship under the supervision of Prof. Yu Cheng, focusing on natural language processing research.
highlights: Research on large language models and truthfulness
Worked on interpretability and reasoning in LLMs

education.institution: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology

publications.name: SynLogic: Synthesizing Verifiable Reasoning Data at Scale for Learning Logical Reasoning and Beyond
publications.summary: First author paper on synthesizing verifiable reasoning data for learning logical reasoning. Co-authors include Yuanxiang Fan, Zhuo Jiang, Han Ding, Yongyi Hu, Chi Zhang, Yiqi Shi, Shitong Weng, Aili Chen, Shiqi Chen, Yunan Huang, Mozhi Zhang, Pengyu Zhao, Junjie Yan, Junxian He.
publications.authors: Junteng Liu, Yuanxiang Fan, Zhuo Jiang, Han Ding, Yongyi Hu, Chi Zhang, Yiqi Shi, Shitong Weng, Aili Chen, Shiqi Chen, Yunan Huang, Mozhi Zhang, Pengyu Zhao, Junjie Yan, Junxian He

publications.name: On the Perception Bottleneck of VLMs for Chart Understanding
publications.summary: First author paper on perception bottlenecks in vision-language models for chart understanding. Co-authors include Weihao Zeng, Xiwen Zhang, Yijun Wang, Zifei Shan, Junxian He.
publications.authors: Junteng Liu, Weihao Zeng, Xiwen Zhang, Yijun Wang, Zifei Shan, Junxian He

publications.name: On the Universal Truthfulness Hyperplane Inside LLMs
publications.summary: First author paper on universal truthfulness hyperplane inside large language models, published at EMNLP 2024. Co-authors include Shiqi Chen, Yu Cheng, Junxian He.
publications.authors: Junteng Liu, Shiqi Chen, Yu Cheng, Junxian He

publications.name: In-Context Sharpness as Alerts: An Inner Representation Perspective for Hallucination Mitigation
publications.summary: Co-authored paper on hallucination mitigation in large language models, published at ICML 2024. Authors include Shiqi Chen, Miao Xiong, Junteng Liu, Zhengxuan Wu, Teng Xiao, Siyang Gao, Junxian He.
publications.authors: Shiqi Chen, Miao Xiong, Junteng Liu, Zhengxuan Wu, Teng Xiao, Siyang Gao, Junxian He

publications.name: C-Eval: A Multi-Level Multi-Discipline Chinese Evaluation Suite for Foundation Models
publications.summary: Co-authored paper on Chinese evaluation suite for foundation models, published at NeurIPS 2023. Authors include Yuzhen Huang, Yuzhuo Bai, Zhihao Zhu, Junlei Zhang, Jinghan Zhang, Tangjun Su, Junteng Liu, Chuancheng Lv, Yikai Zhang, Jiayi Lei, Yao Fu, Maosong Sun, Junxian He.
publications.authors: Yuzhen Huang, Yuzhuo Bai, Zhihao Zhu, Junlei Zhang, Jinghan Zhang, Tangjun Su, Junteng Liu, Chuancheng Lv, Yikai Zhang, Jiayi Lei, Yao Fu, Maosong Sun, Junxian He

publications.name: Composing Parameter-Efficient Modules with Arithmetic Operations
publications.summary: Co-authored paper on parameter-efficient modules, published at NeurIPS 2023. Authors include Jinghan Zhang, Shiqi Chen, Junteng Liu, Junxian He.
publications.authors: Jinghan Zhang, Shiqi Chen, Junteng Liu, Junxian He
